title: Brainfile Epic Schema
description: Example schema for epic documents. An epic groups related tasks and tracks their collective progress. Extends the base task schema with children (grouped item IDs) and status fields.

children.description: List of item IDs that this epic groups together. These are typically task IDs (e.g., 'task-1', 'task-5') but can reference any item type.

status.description: Current status of the epic. Unlike task priority or column, this is a freeform field for tracking epic-level progress.
